chapters.title: Fractions (अपूर्णांक)
chapters.summary: Understanding parts of a whole and basic fractional operations.

concepts.name: Introduction to Fractions
concepts.explanation: A fraction represents a part of a whole or, more generally, any number of equal parts.
concepts.realLifeExample: Slicing a pizza into 8 equal pieces. If you eat 3 pieces, you ate 3/8 of the pizza.
concepts.villageExample: Dividing a 2-acre farm into 4 equal plots for different crops. Each plot is 1/4 of the farm.

skills.name: Numerical Thinking
skills.description: Ability to understand and work with numbers.

skills.name: Problem Solving
skills.description: Finding solutions to difficult or complex issues.

careers.name: Accountant
careers.description: A professional who performs accounting functions.

chapters.title: Water and Life (पाणी आणि जीवन)
chapters.summary: Understanding the importance of water, the water cycle, and water conservation.

concepts.name: Water Cycle and Conservation
concepts.explanation: The continuous movement of water within the Earth and atmosphere.
concepts.realLifeExample: Water droplets forming on the outside of a cold glass of water (condensation).
concepts.villageExample: Building a small check dam (बंधारा) to stop rainwater and increase the groundwater level.

skills.name: Environmental Awareness
skills.description: Understanding the environment and its protection.

careers.name: Environmental Scientist
careers.description: Studying the environment and developing solutions.
